news.headline: Investors wary as UK bond rates drop due to fiscal difficulties; concerns mount.
Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) elects early settlement of prepaid stock purchase contracts, announced on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on March 27, 2025, Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) revealed its decision to utilize the early settlement right to finalize all prepaid stock purchase contracts. This move signifies the Company's choice to take action on its financial strategy.

news.headline: Tea extract market to reach $4.36 billion by 2030, with a 7.8% CAGR from 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the tea extract market is valued at approximately USD 2.99 billion in 2025. It is anticipated to grow to around USD 4.36 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.8% from 2025 to 2030. Key factors fueling this growth include...

news.headline: Urban One, Inc. (NASDAQ:UONEK) reported Q4 2024 results with net revenue at $117.1M, down 2.7% from 2023. Operating loss of $1.9M compared to $6.8M income in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $26.9M (vs. $27.1M in 2023). CEO highlighted $103.5M Adjusted EBITDA, $137.1M in cash reserves. Broadcast and digital operating income up 1.7%. Core radio revenue demand weakened. Digital segment saw 50.7% increase in Adjusted EBITDA. Stressed on cost containment and deleveraging in 2025. Liquidity position strong with cash reserves.
news.summary: Urban One, Inc. reported its results for the three months ended December 31, 2024, with net revenue at approximately $117.1 million, a 2.7% decrease from the same period in 2023. The company had an operating loss of $1.9 million, compared to operating income of $6.8 million in 2023. Broadcast and digital operating income was approximately $38.6 million, showing a 1.7% increase from 2023. Net loss for the period was approximately $35.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $26.9 million, slightly down from $27.1 million in 2023. The CEO mentioned a focus on cost containment and de-levering for 2025, with the company having $137.1 million in cash at year-end. The financials show declines in advertising and overall revenue, but with potential for improvement in the digital segment.

news.headline: XPO board approves $750M share buyback, replacing $503M plan from 2019.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on March 27, 2025, XPO, a prominent freight transportation company in North America, disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved the repurchase of a maximum of $750 million worth of XPO's common stock. This new repurchase program replaces the previous one from February 2019, which had $503 million still available as of March 26, 2025.

news.headline: UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC. (NASDAQ: UCL) to sponsor the LD Micro Invitational XV on April 9-10, 2025 in New York City.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC. (NASDAQ: UCL), a prominent player in the mobile data traffic sharing sector, revealed its sponsorship for the LD Micro Invitational XV scheduled for April 9-10, 2025, at the Westin Grand Central in New York City. UCLOUDLINK is recognized as the pioneer and top contender in the global marketplace for mobile data traffic sharing.

news.headline: Banks borrow £58.4bln in BoE short-term repo operation
Portuguese Banco Comercial notifies correction in securities transaction notice, updates details. #finance #update
news.summary: A recent report highlights a rise in unemployment rates in the United States, with the number of jobless individuals reaching 6.2 million. This increase reflects a 2% jump in the unemployment rate, now standing at 4%. Additionally, the report shows a decline in job vacancies by 1.4 million, with a total of 5.5 million openings available. The data suggests a challenging job market scenario for many Americans amidst the ongoing economic uncertainties.

news.headline: Planet 13 opens 31st FL dispensary in Port Richey with a 3,465 sq ft space; grand opening on March 28-29, 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Planet 13 Holdings Inc. announced the opening of its 31st Florida dispensary in Port Richey, situated at 6939 Ridge Road. This new dispensary spans 3,465 square feet and is set to debut on March 28 and 29, 2025. Activities include a ribbon-cutting ceremony by the Greater Pasco Chamber of Commerce at 8:45 a.m. on Friday, March 28. Attendees can partake in live music by a local DJ and consult with an on-site doctor about obtaining a medical card.

news.headline: Akamai ensures uninterrupted Linux Kernel development by hosting kernel.org, providing long-term stability.
news.summary: Cambridge-based company Akamai has taken over hosting responsibilities for kernel.org, ensuring sustained support for the open-source Linux operating system. This move is aimed at providing long-term stability for the development and maintenance of the Linux kernel. This partnership was solidified on March 27, 2025, marking an important milestone. The Linux kernel serves as the foundational software for the Linux operating system, vital for the functioning of various devices and systems. Akamai's involvement in hosting kernel.org signifies a positive step towards ensuring the seamless operation of Linux, which is widely utilized across the globe. This development showcases a commitment to enhancing the sustainability and growth of the open-source community.

news.headline: Inertial Labs unveils M-AJ-QUATRO anti-jamming system under VIAVI (NASDAQ: VIAV) promising assured navigation.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Chandler, Arizona, Inertial Labs, a company under VIAVI Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: VIAV), introduced the M-AJ-QUATRO anti-jamming antenna system. This system features Controlled Reception Pattern Antenna (CRPA) and digital processing technologies.

news.headline: Akamai launches Akamai Cloud Inference, offers 3x throughput, 60% less latency, and 86% lower cost than traditional systems.
news.summary: A new service is now available for companies which promises to boost throughput by 3 times, reduce latency by 60%, and cut costs by a significant 86% compared to traditional hyperscale infrastructure. Launched in Cambridge, Mass. on March 27, 2025, this service is provided by Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM), a prominent cybersecurity and cloud computing company.

news.headline: Akamai introduces VPUs in the cloud for video processing, enhancing cybersecurity. Launch announced on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Akamai, a cybersecurity and cloud computing company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, recently introduced a new category of cloud-based compute services. This offering is driven by NETINT video processing units. The launch took place on March 27, 2025. Akamai, listed as AKAM on the NASDAQ stock exchange, specializes in safeguarding and supporting online businesses. The new Akamai Cloud service aims to leverage the capabilities of its partnership with NETINT to enhance its cloud computing offerings.

news.headline: Clean Energy, based in Newport Beach, starts a Stock Repurchase Program. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: Clean Energy has officially launched their Stock Repurchase Program in Newport Beach, California. The program aims to repurchase a significant number of company shares.

news.headline: IDE study reports preliminary results on Ringer™ PBC at CTO Plus Conference - Investigates for coronary perforations.
news.summary: A recent multicenter study is examining the use of Ringer™ PBC for the treatment of coronary perforations. The study involves multiple research centers and aims to evaluate the effectiveness of this solution in managing these perforations. This investigation is significant in the field of cardiology and may have implications for future patient care. The findings of this study could provide valuable insights into the use of Ringer™ PBC in handling coronary perforations and may impact treatment protocols. This study demonstrates a concentrated effort to address this specific medical concern and has the potential to influence medical practices.

news.headline: Air India Express signs engine leaseback deal for 26 CFM56-7B engines on Boeing 737-800, amid cost savings program with Willis Lease Finance Corporation.
news.summary: In Coconut Creek, Florida, on March 27, 2025, Air India Express (AIX), a subsidiary of Air India, finalized engine sale and leaseback agreements with Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC) for 26 CFM56-7B engines in use on 13 Boeing 737-800 aircraft. These agreements, part of WLFC’s ConstantThrust® program, guarantee heightened reliability and significant cost efficiencies in contrast to conventional MRO shop visits. This deal is an extension of a previous agreement signed in 2022 between WLFC and Air India, involving 34 CFM56-5B engines utilized on Air India’s Airbus A320 fleet. Both initiatives will be overseen by WLFC’s team based in GIFT City, India.

news.headline: Local developer James Dainard from Washington leads A&E's new TV series "Million Dollar Zombie Flips".
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Bellevue, Washington, James Dainard, an experienced real estate developer and Washington native, is now participating in A&E's Home.Made.Nation Saturday series. Dainard, known for his expertise with The ProjectRE Academy, joins the show as a renovation expert.

news.headline: Commercial real estate company BI Erhvervsejendomme A/S releases information document. No. of properties: 50. Latest revenue: $10 million.
news.summary: The recent report revealed that there has been a significant increase in global carbon dioxide emissions by 4.9% in 2021 compared to the previous year. This rise marks the largest surge in emissions since 2010. The total CO2 emissions reached 36.4 billion metric tons in 2021, the second-highest annual total in history. This surge is primarily attributed to the rebound in economic activities following the COVID-19 pandemic, increased coal consumption, and the soaring demand for oil and gas. The surge has raised concerns among environmentalists and experts about the urgent need for stronger climate action to curb the escalating emissions and combat climate change effectively. The findings underscore the critical importance of implementing sustainable and renewable energy solutions to mitigate the impact of human activities on the environment.

news.headline: Infosys aids LKQ Europe's HR transformation with digital platform across 18 countries. March 27, 2025. #Infosys #LKQEurope
news.summary: Utilizing Infosys Cobalt technology, a digital platform will be implemented to enhance and simplify HR operations in 18 countries within LKQ Europe. This initiative is taking place in Bengaluru, India, announced on March 27, 2025. Infosys, recognized for its advanced digital solutions, is listed on multiple stock exchanges including NSE (INFY), BSE (INFY), and NYSE (INFY).

news.headline: Verdantis introduces AI solutions, Auto-Enrich AI and Auto-Spec AI, to enhance Master Data Management.
news.summary: Verdantis, a Princeton-based company specializing in AI-driven Master Data Management (MDM) solutions, has unveiled two groundbreaking products, Auto-Enrich AI and Auto-Spec AI, on March 27, 2025. These innovations are set to revolutionize data integrity, enrichment, and operational efficiency in various industries. With the introduction of these advanced technologies, Verdantis aims to enhance the accuracy and reliability of data processes on a significant scale. Auto-Enrich AI and Auto-Spec AI represent a major step forward in the realm of MDM, promising to streamline operations and drive efficiencies in organizations.

news.headline: Former Paulson partner relaunches hedge fund with Qube and other investors.
Epson partners with Bertelkamp Automation as AutomateFirst Gold Partner, bringing advanced solutions to Southeast region. #1 SCARA robot manufacturer.
news.summary: Epson Robots, a leading SCARA robot manufacturer worldwide, has recently formed a strategic alliance with Bertelkamp Automation Inc. (BAI) to introduce cutting-edge automation solutions in the Southeast Region. The partnership aims to revolutionize the industrial landscape by combining Epson's expertise with BAI's innovative technology. The collaboration, unveiled on March 27, 2025, is set to enhance the automation sector significantly. This move is expected to showcase advanced solutions to a wider audience, leveraging Epson's dominance with SCARA robots and BAI's proficiency in automation technologies. The alliance promises to bring state-of-the-art automation advancements to the region, driving industrial growth and technological progress.

news.headline: Adecoagro (NYSE: AGRO) partners with Tether Investments, a sustainable production company in South America.
news.summary: Luxembourg, 27th March 2025 - Adecoagro S.A. (NYSE: AGRO), a prominent sustainable production company in South America, has entered into a partnership with Tether Investments S.A. de C.V., a part of the Tether Group known for issuing USDT, the global leader in stablecoins. Adecoagro, listed on NYSE as AGRO, is recognized for its sustainable practices across South America, while Tether Investments is affiliated with USDT, the top stablecoin. This collaboration is poised to have a significant impact given the stature and reach of both entities.

news.headline: France's Macron spoke with US President Trump ahead of Paris meeting on Ukraine - French Presidency.
Jereh Group showcases AI-powered innovations at cippe 2025 in Beijing with a theme of "Innovating a Sustainable Future".
news.summary: During the 25th China International Petroleum & Petrochemical Technology and Equipment Exhibition (cippe 2025) in Beijing, Jereh Group presented innovations under the theme "Innovating a Sustainable Future," making a notable impression. The event took place on March 26, 2025. Jereh Group highlighted its recent progress in the oil sector, attracting significant attention.

news.headline: NUNC Capital invests €20M in Ukraine's defense tech through Venture Building Initiative, bridging European markets.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 27, 2025, NUNC Capital, headquartered in Amsterdam, revealed a new initiative worth €20 million aimed at supporting early-stage Ukrainian defense technologies. This Venture Building Initiative seeks to foster connections between Ukraine's burgeoning defense sector and the established markets in Europe, with the goal of enhancing collaboration and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Auto stocks plummet post Trump's tariff news. U.S. levies disrupt supply chains of carmakers exporting from Mexico, Canada, Japan, S. Korea, Germany.
news.summary: It is anticipated that the import tariffs imposed by the United States will create chaos in the intricate supply networks of leading automobile manufacturers. This will particularly impact companies that ship vehicles from Mexico, Canada, Japan, South Korea, and Germany.

news.headline: Colorado Chiropractic Association launches career center with SmartJobBoard to connect professionals across Colorado.
news.summary: In Denver, on March 27, 2025, a new online platform has been launched to link chiropractors with job prospects and valuable professional growth tools throughout Colorado. SmartJobBoard is at the forefront, utilizing AI technology to offer job board services to various entities like associations, nonprofits, and government organizations. This platform aims to provide opportunities and resources for chiropractors in the state and is expected to benefit a substantial number of professionals.

news.headline: UK SMBs remain resilient and optimistic, with 54% expressing optimism about the future amidst uncertain economic conditions.
news.summary: London-based global payments provider Elavon recently conducted a merchant survey indicating that UK small-to-medium businesses (SMBs) have shown a heightened ability to adapt to uncertainty in their external business environment. Despite facing fiscal challenges, a substantial portion of UK businesses maintain a positive outlook for the future, with 54% expressing optimism about the UK's economic prospects over the next 12 months. The survey, conducted in February, underscores the agility and resilience displayed by SMBs in response to the unpredictable market conditions.

news.headline: BOE's dhingra: We are still at orderly fragmentation at this point.
GTA sees worst February for new home sales with 400 units sold, down 50% from 2024 and 84% below 10-year average.
news.summary: The Greater Toronto Area experienced historically slow new home sales in February 2025, with only 400 new home sales reported. This number reflects a 50% decrease from February 2024 and an 84% drop from the 10-year average of 2570 units. Condominium apartments accounted for 152 of the total sales, showing a 62% decrease from the previous year and a 90% decline from the 10-year average. Single-family home sales totaled 248, down 38% from February 2024 and 75% below the 10-year average. The uncertainty surrounding upcoming US tariff levels was cited as a factor contributing to the low sales numbers.

news.headline: FedEx urged to disclose details on its international business operations.
Study finds women 4-6 times more likely to suffer ACL tears due to anatomical, hormonal, and muscular differences.
N-able earns 5-star rating in CRN Partner Program Guide for fourth consecutive year. Elite recognition.
news.summary: N-able, Inc., a global software company specializing in IT services, has received the prestigious 5-Star Award from CRN® for its 2025 Partner Program Guide, marking the fourth consecutive year of recognition. This award, given by The Channel Company, highlights companies that excel in building partner programs focused on fostering growth and success. N-able (NYSE: NABL) is known for helping IT services providers deliver security, data protection as-a-service, and unified endpoint management solutions. The 5-Star Award underscores N-able's commitment to its partners and the quality of its programs.

news.headline: R Systems International Limited in India awarded Great Place To Work certification for 2025-2026, a global leader in digital product engineering.
news.summary: R Systems International Limited, a prominent player in digital product engineering globally, is pleased to declare its reiteration as a Great Place To Work® in NOIDA, India. Great Place To Work® certification reflects the outstanding workplace culture at the company, underscoring its commitment to employee satisfaction and well-being.

news.headline: Hirsch introduces Velocity Central for integrated security monitoring, offering efficiency and protection.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Ana, California, specializing in high-security access control, video intelligence, and identity solutions known as Hirsch, is showcasing a new platform called Velocity Central. This platform aims to simplify operations, improve security measures, and seamlessly integrate various security systems with exceptional efficacy. Currently accessible for implementation, Velocity Central is being unveiled to specific partners and integrators, providing dependable performance and customizable features for better security management.

news.headline: ECB's Villeroy: Increase in long term yields, all things being equal, tightens financial conditions.
Forescout Vedere Labs finds 46 new vulnerabilities in global solar power systems, posing systemic security risks.
news.summary: Research conducted by Forescout Vedere Labs in San Jose, California, has identified 46 newly discovered vulnerabilities in solar power systems. These vulnerabilities pose significant risks to the global solar power infrastructure. The research sheds light on potential cybersecurity threats facing solar power systems worldwide.

news.headline: Theravance Biopharma will share new ampreloxetine data for nOH at AAN meeting. Studies 169 and 170 analyzed.
news.summary: Dublin - Today, Theravance Biopharma, Inc. shared new insights from the Phase 3 program of ampreloxetine, including Studies 169 and 170. These analyses highlight the drug's distinctive pharmacodynamic profile. Theravance Biopharma, listed as TBPH on NASDAQ, revealed this update.

news.headline: Wirex launches travel booking platform with crypto payments and rewards, offering up to 65% off hotel prices and up to 8% cashback.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in London, Wirex, a prominent web3 money application, announced the introduction of Wirex Travel, a booking platform aimed at enhancing its status as the preferred payment option for travelers. The new platform offers substantial discounts of up to 65% on hotel prices along with up to 8% cashback incentives for users who make payments through the app.

news.headline: DPC Dash Ltd's 2024 revenues hit RMB4.31 billion, up 41.4%, with 240 new stores; net profit surged 1,394.2% to RMB131.2M.
news.summary: Total revenues saw a significant increase, reaching RMB4.31 billion, reflecting a strong 41.4% growth compared to the previous year. Store-level operating profit also showed impressive growth at 48.7%, while the adjusted group EBITDA experienced a notable increase of 64.1%. The adjusted net profit surged to RMB131.2 million, marking an exceptional growth rate of 1,394.2% year-over-year. In the year 2024, the company successfully added 240 net new stores to its network.

news.headline: AI security startup Straiker launches with $21M funding from Lightspeed Ventures and Bain Capital, to protect AI applications.
news.summary: Straiker, a security company specializing in AI-driven solutions, has revealed the first AI-native product designed to protect AI applications and agents. The company, based in Sunnyvale, California, emerged from stealth mode on March 27, 2025. They secured $21 million in initial funding from Lightspeed Ventures and Bain Capital to support their launch.

news.headline: Legit Security unveils new Vulnerability Prevention Dashboard, the sole ASPM platform offering controls pre-merge.
news.summary: A recent update on March 27, 2025, revealed that Legit Security, renowned for its AI-driven application security posture management (ASPM) solutions, introduced a new platform. This platform stands out as the sole ASPM system capable of implementing preventive measures to address concerns prior to software releases or merges. Legit's innovative approach seeks to establish guardrails and controls to proactively tackle issues before they escalate. The development marks a significant stride in enhancing security protocols in software development processes.

news.headline: Unified Streaming and castLabs launch high-frequency key rotation for secure live streaming in 2025, enhancing content security.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Amsterdam and Berlin, Unified Streaming and castLabs have jointly announced a cutting-edge high-frequency key rotation system aimed at boosting content security and enabling smooth scalability. This innovative solution is geared towards enhancing the safeguarding of premium content.

news.headline: Kellen Booher appointed President & COO at CopperPoint, bolstering executive team. Company operates in 21 states.
news.summary: CopperPoint Insurance Company, a prominent provider of workers' compensation and commercial insurance solutions in 21 states, has recently seen further progress with the appointment of a former Chubb Executive Vice President to their executive team. This development took place on March 27, 2025, bolstering the company's leadership with valuable expertise. The company continues to strengthen its position in the industry, with a firm presence across multiple states.

news.headline: MEXC introduces CORN listing with 149,000 USDT prize pool for spot and futures markets starting March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on March 27, 2025, a renowned global cryptocurrency exchange known as MEXC revealed plans to list CORN (CORN) on their spot and futures markets starting March 28, 2025 (UTC). Alongside this listing, MEXC will host an engaging Airdrop+ rewards event, offering users a chance to participate in this exciting opportunity.

news.headline: Omni Agent Solutions appoints Voorhies to leadership position. Based in Calif., they offer admin services & tech solutions for bankruptcy cases.
news.summary: Woodland Hills, CA – On March 27, 2025, Omni Agent Solutions, Inc., a top information management firm, offers professional administrative services and tech solutions for intricate case administration in corporate bankruptcy, class action, and mass tort litigation.

news.headline: S5 Equity acquires Heartland America, a discount catalog retailer, marking their first acquisition of 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, S5 Equity, an investment firm from southern California, declared the purchase of Heartland America, a top discount catalog and online retailer. This acquisition is significant as it is S5 Equity's initial acquisition of the year, adding to their strategic endeavors.

news.headline: Wishpond and Venops partner to market AI-powered SalesCloser platform (Provencis) to healthcare industry clients, aiming to expand reach.
news.summary: Wishpond has recently teamed up with Venops in a collaboration deal to promote and distribute Wishpond's SalesCloser platform, powered by AI, under the name Provencis. The partnership aims to target clients within the healthcare and medical sectors. This move highlights Wishpond's dedication to broadening the availability of SalesCloser, emphasizing its commitment to growth.

news.headline: Hot Chili announces positive PFS for Costa Fuego Cu-Au Project with top quartile copper production scale and lowest quartile capital intensity.
news.summary: Hot Chili Limited, a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: HCH), Toronto Stock Venture Exchange (TSXV: HCH), and OTCQX (HHLKF), has disclosed its impressive performance metrics. The company's copper production falls within the top quartile in terms of scale, while its capital intensity is the lowest quartile. This achievement is attributed to its strategic location on the Coastal Range in Chile. This news was shared from Perth, Australia, on March 27, 2025.
